The Resort

Where the garden does most of the talking

Coconut Greenland Resort sits in the quiet countryside of Ambepur, in the shadow of Sagargad Fort — the kind of Konkan landscape where coconut and banana groves outnumber buildings. The property is built around that landscape rather than against it: brick-red cottages with sloped green roofs, stone-and-grass diamond pathways, and a garden that stays lit long after sunset.

Two pools, a temple corner, a small gym, and rooms that open straight onto the lawns — it's a resort built for slow mornings and long evenings, whether you're here for one night or just one very good day.
